_comment: Example plugin catalog manifest (Phase 10). Host it on an SSRF-allowlisted https URL and set it as the catalog URL in gitplugins Configuration. Either a bare list or {"plugins":[...]} is accepted. Each entry needs a valid plugin_key (a-z0-9_) and an https url; ref_policy ∈ track_branch|latest_tag|pin_tag|pin_sha|release (default latest_tag). Optional per-entry known_issues feed the Phase 7 registry under source 'catalog'. Advisory only — every install still runs the full confirm + preflight.

plugins.name: Example Plugin
plugins.description: A GLPI plugin hosted in a public git repository.

plugins.name: Example Pinned Plugin
plugins.description: Same idea, pinned to the latest release tag.

known_issues.message: First sync can be heavy; schedule off-peak.
